title: Refreshed Pottery Sherds
description: A new higher quality look for Pottery Sherds!
body:
## Renewing Pottery Sherds for all of your pottery endeavors!
Refreshed Pottery Sherds renews and polishes the Pottery Sherd items while keeping them authentic to the original textures. This pack does not at all change actual pots or any of its patterns

## Notes
**If you're looking for a pack that changes pots I highly recommend you check out Redecorated Pot by Abbygail!**  
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redecorated-pot](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redecorated-pot)

Also check out my other packs [Cell's Book Club](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cells-book-club) and [Lily Padding](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lily-padding)!
